description: Top-level config is a map of node names to Config objects. Keys prefixed with x- are YAML anchors (ignored by the parser).

^x-.description: YAML anchor definitions for reuse via merge keys.

agent.description: Use the running SSH agent (SSH_AUTH_SOCK) for authentication. Most secure — keys never leave the agent.

key.description: Path to the private SSH key.

password_command.description:
Shell command whose stdout is used as the password. Supports macOS Keychain, pass, 1Password CLI, etc.
Example: "security find-generic-password -s mesh -w" (macOS) or "pass show mesh/server" (pass/gpg).

known_hosts.description: Path to the known_hosts file for server verification.

AuthCfg.description: AuthCfg configures authentication for a connection.

lan_discovery_group.description: Group names for LAN discovery. Empty disables dynamic discovery. Peers with no overlapping group ignore each other.

ClipsyncCfg.description: ClipsyncCfg represents the YAML configuration structure.

listeners.description: Local server ports to bind (e.g., SOCKS, HTTP proxies, Relays, or an embedded SSH server).

connections.description: Outbound SSH connections to other peers, which encapsulate port forwards and proxy rules.

gateway.description: LLM API gateway instances (Anthropic <-> OpenAI format translation).

admin_addr.description:
Admin server listen address for the local HTTP API and web UI.
Endpoints: /ui (dashboard), /ui/filesync, /api/state, /api/logs, /api/metrics.
Defaults to "127.0.0.1:7777" (localhost only).
Set to "" to use the default. Set to "off" to disable entirely.

Config.description: Config is the top-level mesh configuration schema.

name.description: A unique identifier for this connection.

mode.description:
Connection mode: "failover" (default) tries targets in order until one succeeds;
"multiplex" connects to ALL targets simultaneously.

targets.description:
A list of target addresses. In failover mode, tried in order. In multiplex mode, all connected simultaneously.
Format: "user@host:port" (e.g., ["root@192.168.1.50:22", "root@10.0.0.1:22"]).

retry.description: How long to wait before attempting to reconnect if the session drops (e.g., "10s"). Defaults to 10s.

auth.description:
Authentication credentials for the target server(s).
Multiple methods can be configured; tried in order: agent → key → password_command.

options.description:
Common SSH options applied to all forwards in this connection.
Supported keys: Ciphers, MACs, KexAlgorithms, HostKeyAlgorithms, ConnectTimeout,
IPQoS, TCPKeepAlive, ServerAliveInterval, ServerAliveCountMax, ExitOnForwardFailure,
GatewayPorts, PermitOpen, RekeyLimit, StrictHostKeyChecking.

forwards.description:
A list of forwarding sets. Each set establishes its own purely independent physical SSH connection for maximum throughput.
In multiplex mode, forwards are applied to each target connection independently.

Connection.description: Connection is an outbound SSH connection to a peer or standard SSH server.

name.description: Friendly name for this gateway instance.

bind.description: Local listening address (must be loopback, e.g., "127.0.0.1:3457").

api_key_env.description: Name of the environment variable holding the upstream API key.

proxy.description: Optional outbound proxy for upstream requests (e.g., "socks5://127.0.0.1:1081").

model_map.description: Model name remapping: client model name -> upstream model name.

default_max_tokens.description: Default max_tokens when the client omits it. Default: 32768.

GatewayCfg.description: GatewayCfg configures a single LLM API gateway instance for bidirectional Anthropic/OpenAI translation.

bind.description: Network address for the filesync HTTP server (e.g., "0.0.0.0:7756").

peers.description: Named peer definitions. Key is a short nickname, value is a list of addresses.

defaults.description: Default values applied to all folders unless overridden per-folder.

folders.description: Folders to synchronize. Key is a human-readable folder ID (must match on all peers).

scan_interval.description:
Periodic full rescan interval (e.g., "60s", "5m"). Default: "60s".
Acts as a safety net alongside real-time filesystem notifications.

max_concurrent.description: Maximum concurrent file transfers per sync cycle. Default: 4.

max_bandwidth.description: Maximum bandwidth for file transfers (e.g., "10MB", "100MB", "1GB"). Value is bytes per second. Default: unlimited.

FilesyncCfg.description: FilesyncCfg configures a folder synchronization instance.

peers.description: Default peer names for folders that don't specify their own.

ignore_patterns.description: Ignore patterns (gitignore-style) applied to all folders. Per-folder patterns are appended.

peers.description: Peer names (overrides defaults.peers). Resolved to addresses via the peers map.

FolderCfgRaw.description: FolderCfgRaw configures a single folder for synchronization (before defaults merge).

type.description: The type of forward. Can be "forward", "socks", or "http". Defaults to "forward".

bind.description: The address to bind and listen on.

target.description: Where to connect traffic to (or upstream for proxies). Optional for socks/http.

Forward.description: Forward is a single unified rule for port forwarding or proxying.

name.description: A unique identifier for this forwarding set.

options.description:
Options overrides or adds to connection-level options.
Only a subset of OpenSSH config keys are parsed: Ciphers, MACs, KexAlgorithms, ConnectTimeout, IPQoS.

remote.description: Reverse forwards (-R). Listens on the remote peer, traffic exits your local machine.

local.description: Local forwards (-L). Listens locally, traffic exits the remote peer.

ForwardSet.description: ForwardSet represents a distinct SSH connection for a group of port forwards and proxies.

name.description: Optional friendly name for this listener.

type.description: The type of listener to create. Can be "socks", "http", "relay", or "sshd".

target.description: The destination address. Required for "relay", optional for "http" (forces it to act as a tunnel to a specific proxy).

host_key.description: Path to the private host key. Required when type="sshd".

authorized_keys.description: Path to the authorized_keys file. Required when type="sshd".

shell.description: Command to execute on SSH session start (e.g., ["bash", "-l"]). Default drops into a basic shell.

options.description:
Additional overrides for the listener.
Only a subset of OpenSSH config keys are parsed: Ciphers, MACs, KexAlgorithms, ConnectTimeout, IPQoS.

Listener.description: Listener represents a local server port (proxy, relay, or sshd).
